name: PolarOps
description: Ops monitoring, checkup aggregation, project health scanning — migrated from SOTAgent's checkup-aggregator + digist-monitor + knowlever-monitor + web-scanner modules.

requirements.need: Checkup 事件聚合 — 接收 PolarCopilot Hub 转发的跨项目 checkup 事件
requirements.approach: CheckupAggregator append-only jsonl 存储，提供查询接口

features.name: POST /api/checkup-events
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

requirements.need: 项目监控 — digist/knowlever 项目健康监控与自动操作
requirements.approach: 各项目 monitor 模块检测运行状态、触发自动编译/同步

features.name: GET /api/digist/status
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: GET /api/knowlever/status
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

depends_on.reason: 启动时通过 PolarPort HTTP API 取端口（POST /api/allocate）
